steps.title: Set the output value
steps.content:
The condition $f(x)=168$ means the output of the function is $168$. Since $f(x)=24x$, write:
$$24x=168$$

steps.title: Divide by the coefficient
steps.content:
Divide both sides by the coefficient to isolate $x$ and get the requested input:
$$x=168/24=7$$
The answer is 7.
